name: JAM Direct
description: The company, JAM Direct Inc., is a Toronto-based digital and direct marketing agency that focuses on inspiring action through hyper-personalized communications, delivering industry-leading results.

name: Jam City
description: Jam City is a prominent mobile entertainment company known for creating engaging games that resonate with a wide audience. It plays a significant role in the evolution of gaming and interactive entertainment.

name: JAM Recruitment
description: JAM is recognized for its dedication to creating innovative and customized solutions for clients, successfully collaborating on technical roles.

name: Jam Agency
description: The company, Jam, is known for delivering award-winning communication campaigns that exceed client expectations, highlighting their expertise in creating impactful projects.

name: Jam Filled Entertainment Inc
description: Jam Filled is an award-winning Canadian animation studio known for its high-quality and creative productions. Since its establishment in 2007, it has expanded significantly and continues to produce original content that emphasizes quality and fun.

name: Jansen Pompentechniek
description: Jansen Pompentechniek BV is a specialized company with over 25 years of experience in pump technology, emphasizing that often the issue lies in the pump's setup rather than the pump itself. They offer tailored solutions for various industries, including food, and have the expertise to identify the right pump for any project.

name: JAM
description: JAM is a specialized service provider in ethical salary portage, offering a range of administrative and legal management services, financial consulting, and business development support for independent professionals. With over 30 years of experience, JAM enables these experts to focus on their core activities while benefiting from the advantages of salaried employment, including contract management and professional liability insurance.

name: Jamy Interactive Inc
description: Jamy Interactive, Inc. is a manufacturer of managed care services that specializes in government-sponsored software development and E-Learning solutions. The company focuses on innovative tools and services for diverse clients, including those in the education sector.

name: JAMS Group
description: Jams Group is a manufacturer based in Bangladesh that specializes in producing ready-made garments, including a variety of apparel such as denim and shorts. Their focus on precise supply chain control ensures timely delivery and quality compliance, making them a reliable source for diverse clothing needs.
